completed_tasks.name: 2FA CSPRNG, PII logging, dead endpoint removal

decisions.decision: Empty string placeholder in appsettings.json preserves schema visibility
decisions.rationale: Signals env var override required while keeping JSON structure discoverable

decisions.decision: AuthException subclasses map to HTTP status codes via middleware switch
decisions.rationale: Centralizes error response formatting, prevents info leakage

decisions.decision: X-Internal-Api-Key injected on ALL YARP proxied requests
decisions.rationale: Simpler than per-cluster config; other services ignore the header
System.Random is predictable; CSPRNG required for 2FA codes

decisions.decision: 2FA log line deleted entirely, not sanitized
decisions.rationale: Per D-09, no safe way to log 2FA codes

decisions.decision: ILogger named placeholders enforced across all auth-service
decisions.rationale: Prevents PII interpolation into log strings

next_action: Run phase verification: all 5 plans executed, need verifier to confirm SEC-01 through SEC-10 requirements are met. Then proceed to Phase 02.
context_notes: All 5 plans in Phase 01 executed successfully across 2 waves. Wave 1 had worktree creation failures for 2 of 4 agents (git config lock contention) — retried without isolation. 01-01 merged from worktree with 2 conflict resolutions (Program.cs and ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.cs). All tests pass. Phase is at verification stage — STATE.md shows 'verifying' status. Some SUMMARY.md files have TBD-like content from the templates but the actual work is done.
